top3.sql:
SELECT 
    r.year,
    r.name,
    r.date,
    r.time
FROM races r
JOIN qualifying q ON r.raceId = q.raceId
JOIN drivers d ON q.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE d.dob = (SELECT MAX(dob) FROM drivers)
ORDER BY r.year, r.date, r.time
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    r.year,
    r.name,
    r.date,
    r.time
FROM races r
JOIN qualifying q ON r.raceId = q.raceId
JOIN drivers d ON q.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE d.dob = (SELECT MAX(dob) FROM drivers)
ORDER BY r.year, r.date, r.time
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    r.year,
    r.name,
    r.date,
    r.time
FROM races r
JOIN qualifying q ON r.raceId = q.raceId
JOIN drivers d ON q.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE d.dob = (
    SELECT MAX(dob) 
    FROM drivers 
    WHERE driverId IN (SELECT DISTINCT driverId FROM qualifying)
)
ORDER BY r.year, r.date, r.time
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    r.year,
    r.name,
    r.date,
    r.time
FROM races r
JOIN qualifying q ON r.raceId = q.raceId
JOIN drivers d ON q.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE d.dob = (SELECT MAX(dob) FROM drivers)
  AND q.position IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY r.year, r.date, r.time
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    r.year,
    r.name,
    r.date,
    r.time
FROM races r
JOIN qualifying q ON r.raceId = q.raceId
JOIN drivers d ON q.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE d.dob = (SELECT MAX(dob) FROM drivers)
ORDER BY r.year, r.date, r.time
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    r.year,
    r.name,
    r.date,
    r.time
FROM races r
JOIN qualifying q ON r.raceId = q.raceId
JOIN drivers d ON q.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE d.dob = (
    SELECT MAX(dob) 
    FROM drivers 
    WHERE driverId IN (SELECT DISTINCT driverId FROM qualifying)
)
ORDER BY r.year, r.date, r.time
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    r.year,
    r.name,
    r.date,
    r.time
FROM races r
JOIN qualifying q ON r.raceId = q.raceId
JOIN drivers d ON q.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE d.dob = (SELECT MAX(dob) FROM drivers)
  AND q.position IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY r.year, r.date, r.time
LIMIT 1;

final.sql:
SELECT 
    r.year,
    r.name,
    r.date,
    r.time
FROM races r
JOIN qualifying q ON r.raceId = q.raceId
JOIN drivers d ON q.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE d.dob = (SELECT MAX(dob) FROM drivers)
ORDER BY r.year, r.date, r.time
LIMIT 1;
